displayTitle: Droids #8: Star Wars According to the Droids, Book III
synopsis: Droids 8 is the eighth and final issue of the Star Wars: Droids series of comics. Published under the Marvel Comics, Star Comics imprint, this issue had a cover price of $1.00 U.S. and $1.25 Canadian. It was published March 17, 1987 with a cover date of June 1987.
title: Star Wars Droids #8: Star Wars According to the Droids, Book III
